final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3x3 character expression grid for Zhao Ling'er from the Legend of Sword and Fairy IP.

Style/medium: 3D animation, Pixar style
Composition: 3x3 grid layout, 9 panels, each panel showing character peeking through a torn hole in white paper
Subject: Zhao Ling'er (young woman with voluminous dark wavy hair and round wire-rimmed glasses) in 9 different expressions and outfits
Scene/backdrop: white paper with torn circular holes as framing device
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: green, red, yellow, black and white, orange, blue, purple, pink, teal (one per panel)
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: top-left: winking, adjusting glasses, green sweater; top-center: smirking, lowering dark sunglasses, red leather jacket; top-right: thinking, finger on chin, yellow hoodie; middle-left: big smile, arms resting on edge, black and white striped shirt; middle-center: smiling, thumbs up, orange button-up shirt; middle-right: neutral, drinking boba tea, blue sweater; bottom-left: happy, waving, purple sweater vest over white shirt; bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed, arms crossed, pink cardigan; bottom-right: silly, poking cheeks, teal sweater
Avoid:
